prompt:
Goal: Create a two-panel horizontal comparison image showing the same arctic warship concept rendered in two different styles.

Canvas: Wide panoramic canvas, approximately 2.6:1 aspect ratio, split into exactly 2 equal rectangular panels with a thick vertical black divider between them and thin black borders around the image.

Layout: Left panel is a dark cinematic realistic scene; right panel is a brighter stylized anime/cartoon scene. Both panels show an icebound naval warship in a frozen harbor at night, surrounded by broken sea ice, cranes, docks, and cold blue lighting.

Left panel details: Render a massive gray battleship or heavy cruiser moored in an icy industrial port at night, viewed from a low front-left angle. The ship has a tall central superstructure, radar mast, gun turrets, dark hull, and imposing silhouette. The harbor water is almost black, filled with large floating ice slabs in the foreground. Add industrial cranes and dock structures on both sides, mostly in silhouette. The sky is deep navy with stars and dramatic bright blue aurora borealis curtains stretching vertically and diagonally above the ship. Mood is serious, ominous, realistic, high-contrast, cold, and cinematic, with subtle snow or ice particles.

Right panel details: Render the same concept as a clean 2D anime illustration with crisp outlines and cel-shaded colors. Show a white armored ice patrol battleship named NORTHERN GHOST printed clearly on the hull. The ship is viewed from a high three-quarter angle from the bow, sitting in cracked pack ice near a harbor. Include a large bridge tower with glowing cyan windows, antennas, radar dishes, searchlights, gun mounts, lifeboats, and deck equipment. Add exactly 3 large harbor cranes in the background on the left, a snowy pier, small buildings, floating ice floes, and a moonlit ocean horizon. The sky is blue-gray night with clouds and a bright full moon in the upper right. Use a cool arctic palette of navy, icy blue, white, and gray, with warm yellow lights on the ship and dock.

Style contrast: Left panel should feel like a highly detailed realistic dark fantasy naval matte painting, while right panel should feel like a cute but detailed Japanese anime concept-art version. Keep both panels compositionally related but visually distinct.

Constraints: Include exactly 2 panels, exactly 1 main warship per panel, exactly 3 visible harbor cranes in the right panel, and the hull text NORTHERN GHOST only on the right-panel ship. No characters, no extra labels, no watermark.
